communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: Processing Records for FOIA #2025-18307
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request all records related to the processing of FOIA Request Number 2025-18307. This request includes, but is not limited to:
​The complete administrative file for the specified request.
​All correspondence (internal and external, including emails and memos) regarding this request.
​Search documentation, including search memos, logs, and specific instructions provided to IRS staff to locate responsive records.
​Fee and referral records, including any fee assessments, fee waiver determinations, or documentation regarding referrals to other agency components.
​The final response letter and any list of withholdings or exemptions (such as a Vaughn Index) applied to the original request.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

GabrielMorrow
